1.name: Budi Santoso
1.content: SuCai Cloud helped us reduce procurement costs by 25% while significantly improving logistics speed. The platform is easy to use and suppliers respond quickly — a reliable long-term partner.

2.name: Siti Rahayu
2.content: As a manufacturing company, we have extremely high quality requirements. SuCai Cloud's supplier audit system gives us confidence — product quality is stable and after-sales service is excellent.

3.name: Ahmad Wijaya
3.content: From hardware to safety equipment, one platform handles all our procurement needs. The AI search is incredibly useful and saves us significant sourcing time. Highly recommended!

4.name: Thomas Chen
4.content: Cross-border procurement used to be our biggest pain point. SuCai Cloud's professional team solved customs, logistics, and payment challenges so we can focus on our core business.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Start your industrial procurement journey — our team is ready to assist

footer.description: SuCai Cloud is a B2B platform specializing in China-Indonesia cross-border industrial supplies procurement, providing one-stop sourcing solutions for enterprises.

productDetail.whatsappMessage: Hello, I'd like to inquire about purchasing "{productName}". Can you help?
productDetail.inquiryHint: After submitting an inquiry, our procurement advisor will contact you within 24 hours

p1.longDescription: BOSCH GWS 750-100 industrial angle grinder with 750W high-power motor for metal cutting, grinding, and deburring. Ergonomic handle design reduces fatigue during extended use. Double insulation protection, CE and CCC certified. Ideal for factory workshops, steel processing, and equipment maintenance with OEM customization and bulk pricing available.

p2.longDescription: Makita 9557NB professional angle grinder with efficient heat dissipation for stable long-hour operation. Compact body design for tight spaces, ideal for metal processing, post-welding work, and field repairs. Makita original quality for contractors and bulk factory procurement.

p3.longDescription: Schneider LC1D09M7C AC contactor, 9A rated current for industrial motor control and automation systems. Silver alloy contacts for long life and low contact resistance. Works with thermal relays for motor overload protection, widely used in production lines and equipment upgrades.

p4.longDescription: ABB A9F74110 miniature circuit breaker, C-curve 10A rated current for industrial distribution panels and building electrical systems. High breaking capacity with fast trip protection. ABB genuine product with bulk supply and project quoting support.

p5.longDescription: GB21148-2020 compliant industrial safety shoes with steel toe cap and puncture-resistant midsole for factory workshops, warehousing, and construction sites. Slip-resistant durable sole with breathable lining. Custom logo and bulk orders available.

specs.material: Full-grain leather + steel toe + Kevlar midsole

p6.longDescription: Makita H910 Pro ABS industrial safety helmet with excellent impact resistance for construction sites, factory workshops, and outdoor work. Adjustable headband for comfortable fit. Custom logo printing available for enterprise bulk orders.

p7.longDescription: 304 stainless steel seamless pipe DN50 with excellent corrosion resistance for food, chemical, and pharmaceutical piping systems. Uniform wall thickness with stable pressure rating. Custom length cutting and bulk supply available.

p8.longDescription: PVC-U water pipe DN32 with high pressure rating for building water supply and industrial cooling systems. Easy connection and efficient installation. Meets drinking water hygiene standards with bulk project supply support.

p9.longDescription: Z41H-16C cast steel gate valve DN80, PN16 rated pressure for steam, water, and oil media piping systems. Robust body structure with reliable sealing. Widely used in chemical, power, and municipal engineering with project quoting support.

p10.longDescription: SKF 6205-2RS deep groove ball bearing with double rubber seals for low noise and long service life. Suitable for motors, pumps, gearboxes, and industrial transmission equipment. SKF genuine product with bulk supply and replenishment agreements.

p11.longDescription: SKF LGMT 2 general-purpose industrial grease for bearings, gears, and other lubrication needs. Excellent water washout and rust protection with wide operating temperature range. 400g tube for convenient field use with bulk purchase support.

p12.longDescription: Makita STST19405 large-capacity industrial tool box, rugged and durable for warehouse logistics and field operations. Multi-layer compartment design for organized tool storage. High-strength latches for safe transport. Ideal for engineering teams and maintenance departments.
